name: Hawaiian Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and set aside.
2. Sprinkle salt over the chicken breasts.
3. Brown the chicken in margarine until fully cooked. Cover and continue cooking.
4. Add the sliced onions and green pepper to the chicken.
5. Combine the peach preserves, soy sauce, and vinegar in a separate bowl.
6. Pour the mixture over the chicken and cook for about three minutes, turning the chicken to glaze it.
7. Remove the chicken from the pan and place on a serving platter.
8. Add the pineapple to the sauce and heat thoroughly.
9. Spoon the hot sauce over the chicken.
